name: Afterlife RPG
description:
Congratulations, it seems you died. But when something ends, something else begins, and it seems your new beginning comes in a form of strange white room and a choice of how your afterlife will turn out exactly.

Will it be a typical isekai story, a venture to heaven or hell, argument with manager of afterlife or something else? It's up to you to decide

Author note:

A silly little RPG bot I decided to make with a twist in form of playful disaster of oversharing narrator. I found it fun enough to decide to publish it, even though I don't expect that many people to interact with it considering how different it is from usually popular creations.
creator: Stefanon
